_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Agile delivery involves encouraging teams to build incrementally, test and iterate their work based on regular feedback and other useful data.
reference_document_element_description: Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformations, automated testing, environment parity between development and production, and deployment processes that enable rapid iteration without production risk.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.406), AB-S-009 (AB, cosine: 0.388).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.636). Shared vocabulary: [build, data]. DDaT-only terms [agile, based, delivery, encouraging, feedback, incrementally] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, controlled, deployment, development, enable, environment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.869, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Agile delivery involves encouraging teams to build incrementally, test and itera" and "Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformati" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.441 < STS 0.636 (gap -0.196). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [agile, based, delivery] and [automated, controlled, deployment] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.3%. Shared tokens: [build, data]. DDaT-only: [agile, based, delivery, encouraging, feedback, incrementally]. WIDAI-only: [automated, controlled, deployment, development, enable, environment].
